props.title: Features
props.subtitle: What's inside Workflow Engine
props.description: Workflow Engine gives you every building block needed to design, version, and execute workflows of any complexity — visually, programmatically, or via REST.

props.subtitle: Feature set
props.title: Everything you need to orchestrate work

items.title: HTML5 Visual Designer
items.text: A built-in drag & drop designer lets business users and developers create interactive workflows of any complexity in a web browser — no need to draft them programmatically. Fully customizable down to individual form controls.

items.title: Core Components
items.text: Activities, Transitions, Actions, Actors, Commands, and Timers — the building blocks of any process. Consistent business semantics regardless of how complex your workflow grows.

items.title: Version Control
items.text: Built-in versioning tracks every change to your workflows. When you update a scheme, decide whether existing processes finish on the old version or migrate to the new one.

items.title: Parallel Workflows
items.text: Split a workflow into multiple branches that execute concurrently. When all branches complete, they merge back and the process continues.

items.title: Timers
items.text: Attach custom timers to transitions — intervals in ms / seconds / minutes / hours / days, or specific date/time triggers. UTC by default, with custom formats supported.

items.title: XML Import / Export
items.text: Workflows are stored as versioned XML definitions in your database. Export for backup and sharing; import to reuse across projects and environments.

items.title: Localization Support
items.text: Localize states, command names, and input parameters into any language, right from the Designer toolbar. No code required.

items.title: Compatibility
items.text: Runs on .NET / .NET Core — any environment that supports the runtime. Ships with providers for Microsoft SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Oracle, MySQL, MongoDB, Azure SQL, and Redis.

items.title: BPMN 2.0 Support
items.text: Model your processes in any BPMN 2.0 tool and execute them inside Workflow Engine — letting analysts and developers work in the notation they already know.

items.title: Integration Options
items.text: Embed as a .NET component, or run Workflow Server and call via REST API. The Designer can be embedded natively or via iframe when styles need isolation.

items.title: Your Own Security Layer
items.text: Workflow Engine ships with no embedded security — by design. Plug in whatever auth and access control model your application already uses, without fighting hardcoded rules.

props.title: Want a deeper look?
props.description: Talk to our team about fit, licensing, and integration for your project.
